title: Elatostema sinopurpureum
taxonomy: Elatostema sinopurpureum is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to certain parts of the world and is part of the Elatostema genus, which consists of various species of plants. The Elatostema genus is classified under the order Urticales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification is based on the plant's botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. The specific classification of Elatostema sinopurpureum helps scientists to understand its place in the plant kingdom.
